upstream.reason: Public MapGap security fork prerelease built from Kepler master and maintained as upstreamable patches.

constraints: Public prerelease uses fixture projects only; do not load partner, customer, or authenticated project data.
Do not expose this app through the V2 Netlify site; publish it as an independently rollbackable prerelease.
Do not allow arbitrary URL, cloud, SQL, plugin, or file-upload features in the alpha.
Do not store provider credentials, user access tokens, or V2 local state in portable projects or Kepler configs.
Run npm run audit:alpha on every dependency or lockfile change; an unfamiliar high finding fails CI.
exitCriteria: A supported upstream or maintained patch line clears the high findings and peer dependency conflicts.
A deployed CSP/WebGL test passes without unsafe-eval.
A production review accepts the resulting SBOM, bundle, license, accessibility, scale, and rollback evidence.
